title: ResourcePackDirectory
body:
# ResourcePackDirectory
![setting screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d66618297b3a65520c80a13bb965ba9e43b39ce5_0.webp)
### Allows to hot change the Minecraft resource pack directory. (No need to restart your MC)
### 更改資源包的資料夾 (不須重啟MC)
## Main Purpose
- pretty useful for different Minecraft launcher and instance like MultiMC PrismMC LunerClient FeatherLauncher etc.

## 🎯 Features

- **Custom Resource Pack Directory**: Place your resource packs anywhere you want
- **Cross-Platform Support**: Compatible with Fabric, NeoForge, and Forge
- **Easy Configuration**: Simple in-game settings interface for directory management
- **Real-time Application**: Change directory location without restarting the game

## 🚀 Installation

1. Ensure you have installed a supported mod loader (Fabric/NeoForge/Forge)
2. Place the mod file in your `mods` folder
3. Launch the game

## ⚙️ Usage

### Through In-Game Settings

1. Install [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)  (Fabric only)
2. Click "Mods" in the main menu
3. Find "ResourcePackDirectory" and click the settings button
4. Use the following options:
   - **Path Input Field**: Directly enter the new resource pack directory path
   - **Browse Button**: Open file browser to select directory
   - **Reset Button**: Restore to default directory (`./resourcepacks/`)
   - **Confirm**: Apply changes
   - **Cancel**: Discard changes

### Note
I make ModMenu an optional dependency because some client can't use Modmenu, thus we need other mods like [Menulogue](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/menulogue) or any else

### Through Configuration File (Require restart)

Configuration file location: `config/resourcepackdirectory.json`

```json
{
  "resourcepackdirectory": "./resourcepacks/"
}
```
